title: Senior Fleet Manager at Meesho Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Meesho Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Meesho Logistics! We are hiring a Fleet Manager for our Bhopal team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Meesho Logistics:
Meesho Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho Logistics!
